home_description: A simple starting point for navigating the app while the product surface is still taking shape.
dashboard_description: This page exists mainly to prove the folder-per-route TanStack Router convention. The route file is a thin adapter and the page UI lives in the pages layer.
sign_in_description: Use your account credentials to continue into the workspace.
auth_email_description: Use the email address tied to your account.
auth_password_description: Enter the password for this workspace account.
auth_name_description: Use the name that should appear inside the workspace.
auth_confirm_password_description: Re-enter the password to avoid typos.
auth_generic_error: We could not complete this request. Please try again.
sign_up_description: Start with a workspace-ready account and continue into the app.
auth_checking_description: Please wait while we verify your authentication state.
sign_out_description: This route is reserved for the future sign-out flow. Auth action wiring is still TBD.
organization_description: This dynamic folder route demonstrates TanStack Router path params while keeping domain persistence decisions out of the first database setup pass.
